summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 7 Bug Fixes: 1) Dashboard Activity Trend chart now renders with data (40 data points with service_count and visit_count), 2) Field Sets tab in Admin Settings has full CRUD UI (Add Field Set button, form with name/label/type/required fields, Save button), 3) Role-based button visibility correctly implemented - Admin/Case Worker see all action buttons, Volunteer sees none.

issues: Chart bars appear very light/faint - may need higher opacity or darker color for better visibility

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/dashboard/trends returns 40 data points with service_count and visit_count fields
Backend: Trends data has actual activity (not all zeros) - services and visits present
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns client_count, service_count, visit_count, outcome_count
Backend: GET /api/admin/field-sets returns list of field sets
Backend: PUT /api/admin/field-sets creates/updates field set successfully
Backend: Created field set persists in subsequent GET
Backend: Admin can access admin endpoints
Backend: Case Worker can login and access clients
Backend: Volunteer can login and access clients
Backend: Volunteer correctly denied access to admin endpoints (403)
Frontend: Dashboard Activity Trend chart visible with 14 bar elements rendering data
Frontend: Admin sees 'Onboard Client' and 'Add Client' quick actions on Dashboard
Frontend: Admin sees 'Reports' quick action on Dashboard
Frontend: Admin sees 'Add Client' and 'Onboard Wizard' buttons on Clients page
Frontend: Admin sees 'Schedule Visit' button on Calendar page
Frontend: Admin sees 'Log Service', 'Add Outcome', 'Add Follow-up' buttons on Client Detail
Frontend: Case Worker sees 'Onboard Client' and 'Add Client' quick actions on Dashboard
Frontend: Case Worker does NOT see 'Reports' quick action (correctly hidden)
Frontend: Case Worker sees 'Add Client' and 'Onboard Wizard' buttons on Clients page
Frontend: Case Worker sees 'Schedule Visit' button on Calendar page
Frontend: Volunteer does NOT see 'Onboard Client' quick action (correctly hidden)
Frontend: Volunteer does NOT see 'Add Client' quick action (correctly hidden)
Frontend: Volunteer does NOT see 'Reports' quick action (correctly hidden)
Frontend: Volunteer does NOT see 'Add Client' button on Clients page (correctly hidden)
Frontend: Volunteer does NOT see 'Onboard Wizard' button on Clients page (correctly hidden)
Frontend: Volunteer does NOT see 'Schedule Visit' button on Calendar page (correctly hidden)
Frontend: Volunteer does NOT see 'Log Service' button on Client Detail (correctly hidden)
Frontend: Volunteer does NOT see 'Add Outcome' button on Client Detail (correctly hidden)
Frontend: Volunteer does NOT see 'Add Follow-up' button on Client Detail (correctly hidden)
Frontend: Field Sets tab visible in Admin Settings with 'Add Field Set' button
Frontend: Field Set form opens with name input, field label input, field type selector, required checkbox
Frontend: Field Set form has 'Add Field' and 'Save Field Set' buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js trend chart bars use opacity: 0.7 which makes them appear faint - consider increasing to 0.9 for better visibility
seed_data_creation: Demo data already seeded - 24 clients, 77 services, 37 visits, 25 outcomes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 bug fixes fully tested and verified. All 3 reported bugs are FIXED: 1) Activity Trend chart renders with data from /api/dashboard/trends (40 data points), 2) Field Sets tab has full CRUD UI with Add Field Set button and form, 3) Role-based button visibility works correctly - Admin/Case Worker see action buttons, Volunteer sees none. The trend chart bars appear faint due to opacity:0.7 styling but are functional.
